text: DepEd suspends classes in Brgy. San Roque Marikina due to extreme heat index reaching DANGER level. Stay home, stay safe.
May klase ba bukas? Hindi pa malinaw ang DepEd advisory sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Abangan ang opisyal na anunsyo.
NDRRMC at PHIVOLCS nagbababala: Huwag pumasok sa Permanent Danger Zone ng Mayon. Aktibo ang lava flow at PDC ngayon.
Landslide at km 23 near Brgy. Pandacan Manila cleared by DPWH. One lane now passable. Flagman on duty.
DSWD distributes relief goods to 500 families in Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Distribution at the barangay covered court. Bring valid ID.
May libreng canned goods at bigas sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Pumunta na kung kailangan ng inyong pamilya.
Evacuation centers for Sitio Mabolo Albay volcano evacuees now open at Tacloban covered court and gymnasium.
Relief packs including bottled water and energy bars distributed to 150 families in Barangay Marikina Heights amid heat advisory.
NTC coordinating with telcos for priority restoration of Barangay Paco Manila DRRMO communication lines.
URGENT: Kulang na ang bottled water sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga relief center! Requesting immediate resupply from LGU!
Ang DSWD ay nagbibigay ng mga batayang pangangailangan sa mga pamilyang apektado ng baha sa Sitio Masag Albay.
Walang kuryente sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila mula kahapon. Mag-ingat sa kandila. Sana mabilis pong maibalik.
NDRRMC activates full disaster response for Mayon Volcano eruption. Evacuation of 6-km PDZ ongoing. Relief operations begin.
Walang kuryente dito sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City simula kahapon! Meralco saan na kayo? Kailan maibabalik ang power?
Missing person alert: Maria Santos, 62, Brgy. Poblacion Iligan resident. Last seen evacuating Sitio Riverside yesterday.
Air quality warning: Huwag mag-exercise sa labas ng bahay ngayon sa Maynila. Ang masamang hangin ay mapanganib sa puso at baga.
Evacuation center ni-register lahat ng displaced families sa Sitio Riverside Marikina. Magdala ng ID at gamit para isang linggo.
Rescue team ng NDRRMC nagliligtas ng mga pamilya sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan mula sa banta ng lahar ng bulkan.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Air quality advisory para sa mga may sakit sa puso: Huwag lumabas habang ang air quality index ay nasa 201-300 range sa Maynila ngayon.
NTC advisory: Temporary frequency spectrum allocation for disaster communications in Barangay Marikina Heights area.
Health alert sa Maynila: Ang mga nagtatrabaho sa labas ng bahay ay dapat magbihis ng makapal at magsuot ng N95 mask laban sa polusyon.
National highway flooded in Barangay Agusan CDO. Passable for light vehicles only. Heavy trucks must use alternate route.
HELP! Stuck sa bubong ng bahay sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan habang tumataas ang lahar! May kasama akong sanggol!
MANDATORY EVACUATION: All residents in low-lying areas near Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley river must evacuate immediately.
Ang mga cargo trucks ay hindi makaraan sa Brgy. Daraga Albay dahil sa nabagsak na tulay.
Sulphur dioxide emission from Mayon Volcano at hazardous levels. All residents within PDZ must have evacuated by tonight.
Senior citizens at bata sa Maynila at karatig-siyudad: manatili sa loob ng bahay. Ang air quality ay nasa VERY UNHEALTHY level ngayon.
Schools in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan closed due to ashfall from volcanic eruption. DepEd to announce return schedule.
Libre na gamot para sa mga may sakit sa Sitio Mabolo Albay evacuation center. Pumunta sa health tent.
Libre baby formula at diapers para sa mga buntis at sanggol sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley distribution point.
Walang kuryente at walang signal sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Ganap na nahiwalay sa komunikasyon.
WHO at DOH nagtutulungan sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos para tugunan ang heat-related illnesses. Pumunta sa pinakamalapit na klinika.
Wala na kaming signal dito sa evacuation center ng Barangay Agusan CDO! Globe at Smart patay na. Radio lang.
Looking for our lolo. Missing since typhoon hit Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Name: Pedro Reyes, 70 years old, diabetic.
DPWH ash-clearing trucks deployed overnight in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Expect limited visibility and road narrowing.
Decampment process simula na sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation center. LGU tumutulong sa mga pamilyang umuuwi na.
SOS! Naiipit ang aming pamilya sa lahar sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga! Hindi na kami makalabas sa bahay! Tulong!
Mga kababayan sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban, may libreng mineral water at juice sa barangay hall ngayon. Kumuha na.
Mental health team available sa Brgy. Daraga Albay evacuation center. Libre ang psychosocial support para sa lahat.
LUMIKAS NA KAYO! Mataas na ang tubig dito sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Bukas na ang evacuation center sa elementarya.
WALANG PASOK bukas sa lahat ng paaralan sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga! DepEd order na. Stay safe mga estudyante.
DepEd schools in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental: 5 total — 2 being used as evacuation shelters, 3 closed for safety assessment.
Walang pasok bukas! Ang lahat ng paaralan sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas ay sarado. Manatili sa bahay at mag-ingat.
Ferry service suspended in Sitio Masag Albay due to rough seas from typhoon. Supply barges on standby.
Lahar rescue operations ongoing in Sitio Riverside Marikina river channel. Army and BFP boats deployed for stranded residents.
NDRRMC confirms all residents within Mayon 6-km PDZ have been evacuated. Monitoring continues 24 hours.
3 bodies recovered from debris in Sitio Mabolo Albay. Death toll officially revised upward. Autopsies ordered.
NDRRMC confirms death toll from flooding in Sitio Masag Albay: 12 fatalities, 3 missing, 45 injured.
Nakatanggap na kami ng libreng pagkain at tubig mula sa LGU Leyte. Maraming salamat sa aming barangay!
PHIVOLCS nagpapanatili ng Alert Level 3 sa Mayon Bulkan. Ipinagbabawal ang pagpasok sa 6-km Permanent Danger Zone.
Ang convoy ng relief goods ay hindi makarating sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila dahil sa blocked road. Nagre-reroute na.
Rescue operation in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro: 30 persons rescued this afternoon. Operations continuing for remaining stranded.
Nalumikas na kami sa evacuation center sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Safe naman kami dito. Salamat sa LGU Batangas.
MISSING: Juan dela Cruz, 55 years old, last seen at Barangay Anibong Tacloban before the typhoon. Wearing blue jacket.
Volcano bulletin: Kanlaon shows increased unrest. Alert Level 3 raised. Mandatory evacuation within 6-km radius now in effect.
Walang klase bukas dahil sa init! Heat index DANGER level sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Stay hydrated mga bata!
ADVISORY: MAGSUOT NG FACEMASK. Naitala ang VERY UNHEALTHY sa Air Quality Sensors ng Lungsod ng Maynila. Iwasan ang paglabas kung hindi kinakailangan.
MAGSUOT NG FACEMASK! Mababa ang kalidad ng hangin ngayon dahil sa usok mula sa sunog sa Navotas Landfill. Huwag lumabas nang walang proteksyon.
Mga buntis at matatanda sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley bibigyan ng priority sa food and water distribution ngayong mainit.
Red Cross medical team at Brgy. Daraga Albay bringing medicine, IV fluids, and first aid kits for flood survivors.
Evacuation update: All residents within permanent danger zone of Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan volcano accounted for. Operations ongoing.
PAGASA raises Typhoon Signal No. 3 in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. LGU orders evacuation of flood-prone barangays tonight.
DepEd distributing ashfall cleanup kits to schools in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Brooms, masks, and disinfectant included.
Transformer napalitan sa main substation ng Barangay Paco Manila. Naka-grid na ulit. Thank you Meralco.
All communication lines to Brgy. Pandacan Manila restored after 36-hour outage from volcanic eruption damage.
Typhoon death toll in Brgy. Daraga Albay confirmed at 300 by NDRRMC. Recovery operations continuing.
RESCUE NEEDED: Family trapped by lahar flow in Sitio Masag Albay! Water and mud at rooftop level! SOS!
Typhoon downed 12 power poles in Barangay Balulang CDO. Meralco crew working overnight restoration. ETA 24 hours.
Rescue helicopter from Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga airlifts 12 persons stranded by volcanic lahar in riverside community.
MISSING: Ang aking tatay ay nawala noong baha sa Brgy. Carmen CDO. Mangyaring makipag-ugnayan sa amin.
Mag-iwas sa kalsada ng Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Maraming debris at mapanganib ang daan.
DPWH road clearing operations ongoing on national highway at Barangay Paco Manila. Expect 6 to 8 hour delay.
Air drops of relief goods initiated for Brgy. Carmen CDO communities inaccessible by land due to lahar flow.
Volcano alert in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte: Barangay captains conducting door-to-door checks to ensure all residents evacuated.
Ang mga eskwelahan sa Maynila ay may special advisory: huwag ituloy ang outdoor activities ngayon dahil sa poor air quality at init ng panahon.
EMERGENCY: Tubig! Walang tubig dito sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina! Grabe ang init tapos wala na ring minom! Tulong po!
Return to school date for Sitio Masag Albay announced: Monday next week, pending clearance from PHIVOLCS.
Buntis na mga nanay sa Maynila: Ang pagkakalantad sa masamang hangin ay mapanganib sa inyong sanggol. Manatili sa loob ng bahay ngayon.
Walang internet ang mga evacuees sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban. May libre-charging station sa evacuation center.
Ang sunog ay naapula na ng BFP sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Dalawang pamilya ang naapektuhan. Ligtas na lahat.
Evacuation route from Barangay Balulang CDO volcanic danger zone reopened after DPWH cleared debris from main road.
Death toll from volcanic eruption in Barangay Agusan CDO rises to 7. Recovery teams still searching for missing.
DepEd Pampanga cancels classes due to PAGASA heat advisory. Extreme heat poses health risk to students.
Search for missing fishermen ongoing. 4 boats from Barangay Anibong Tacloban still unaccounted for after the storm.
Privacy partitions installed for families at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro gymnasium. Breastfeeding area and child-friendly space also set up.
Ibinahagi na ang mga pagkain at gamit sa mga apektadong pamilya sa Sitio Mabolo Albay. Maraming salamat sa DSWD.
Ashfall causes power outage in Barangay Agusan CDO. Meralco isolating affected lines. Restoration estimate: 12 hours.
No electricity in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Complete blackout since typhoon hit. No signal, no internet, no power.
Globe and Smart towers in Barangay Paco Manila damaged by typhoon. No signal in affected areas.
Bridge at Brgy. San Roque Marikina washed out by flash flood. Heavy vehicles diverted via pontoon bridge.
Lumikas na po ang mga pamilya sa mababang lugar ng Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Handa ang evacuation center sa covered court.
Cell site sa bundok ng Brgy. Daraga Albay natanggal ng bagyo. Satellite phone lang ang gumagana sa lugar.
Natuklasan ang 2 katawan sa ilalim ng lahar ng bulkan sa Brgy. Carmen CDO. Dinala na sa probinsyal na morgue.
Huwag kalimutang uminom ng tubig! Heat index sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga ay nakakatakot na mainit ngayon. Mag-ingat.
Volcanic gases detected near Brgy. Pandacan Manila communities. Sulfur dioxide levels elevated. Residents advised to wear masks.
MANDATORY EVACUATION: Alert Level 4 declared for Barangay Balulang CDO volcano. All residents must leave immediately.
Body of missing fisherman from Brgy. Talisay Batangas recovered at Albay shoreline. PCG coordinating with family.
Alternate road to Barangay Agusan CDO via provincial bypass now operational. DPWH opens route for relief convoys.
DepEd nag-announce na ng no classes. Mag-stay sa bahay mga bata. Hindi ligtas lumabas ngayon sa Sitio Riverside Marikina.
Casualty report update: 15 dead, 22 missing, 180 displaced in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte as of 8pm today.
Safe naman kami sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan evacuation site. Maraming salamat sa lahat ng nagbigay ng pagkain at tulong.
URGENT: Puno na ang evacuation center sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental! Wala nang space para sa mga bagong dating na pamilya!
Road to Brgy. Poblacion Iligan IMPASSABLE due to landslide. DPWH equipment deployed. Alternate route via highway 12.
Nagpapadala ng karagdagang cots at kumot sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban evacuation centers para sa mga bagong dating na evacuees.
Typhoon-displaced students from Brgy. Daraga Albay given alternate learning activities while evacuation centers active.
Boil water advisory in effect for all households in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Tap water may be contaminated by flooding.
Ang mga evacuees mula sa Sitio Masag Albay volcanic zone ay maaaring mag-register sa DSWD para sa assistance.
Coast Guard conducting swift water rescue in Barangay Marikina Heights river. 12 families rescued so far. Operations ongoing.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Red Cross distributing relief goods to volcano-affected families in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Operations 7am to 5pm.
Walang klase sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan hanggang mababa ang volcanic alert level. DepEd nagmo-monitor ng sitwasyon.
Dengue alert kasabay ng flood advisory sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Gamitin ang mosquito net at alisin ang nakaimbak na tubig.
No face-to-face classes hanggang sa karagdagang abiso. Distance learning mode activated para sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan.
Volunteer rescue swimmers responding to Barangay Balulang CDO lahar zone. Requesting additional boats from LGU.
Body found along the Barangay Anibong Tacloban riverbank identified as flood victim. Family notified. Burial arrangements ongoing.
DRRM advisory: Monitored air quality sensors sa apat na lokasyon sa Maynila ay nagpapakita ng mapanganib na antas ng polusyon ngayong araw.
Wildfire spotted near upland barangay of Brgy. Pandacan Manila. BFP dispatched. Residents placed on alert.
Tagapamahala ng barangay sa Sitio Masag Albay nagbibigay ng emergency water supply sa bawat pamilya ngayong araw.
Temporary cell tower installed at Sitio Masag Albay evacuation area. Signal strength 3G. Voice calls operational.
Alert Level 4 declared for Kanlaon Volcano. All residents within 8-km danger zone must evacuate immediately.
Ang mga guro ay nagbibigay ng mga module sa mga estudyanteng hindi makarating sa paaralan sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro.
Ang mga guro sa Barangay Paco Manila ay nagboboluntaryo sa evacuation center habang suspendido ang klase.
Emergency radio broadcast activated for Barangay Balulang CDO: tune to 702 DZAS for 24-hour disaster updates.
Relief goods konti na lang sa Sitio Mabolo Albay! Maraming families pa ang wala. Requesting additional supplies mula DSWD.
Nag-aalaga ng lolo naming may hypertension sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Sobrang init. Saan kami makakakuha ng libre na konsultasyon?
Camp management team deploying to Brgy. Daraga Albay evacuation site to handle 300 volcano displaced families.
No classes na naman bukas! Sobrang init at mataas ang heat index sa Brgy. Carmen CDO. DepEd suspends ulit.
Usok mula sa Navotas Landfill fire ay patuloy na nakakaapekto sa air quality ng Maynila, Malabon, Navotas, at Caloocan. Mag-ingat.
Brownout schedule sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos ngayong araw dahil sa overloading ng grid dahil sa mainit na panahon.
Water refill stations activated at Brgy. Daraga Albay. Residents may bring containers up to 20 liters per household.
Ang lahar mula sa bulkan ay tumatawid sa kalsada ng Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Sarado na ang daan. Gumamit ng alternative route.
Power restoration crew nagtatrabaho overnight sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. Asahan ang pagbabalik ng kuryente bukas.
Ang DSWD MDM team ay aktibo sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga para sa family tracing at death certificate processing.
Internet access available only at evacuation center in Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Hotspot available for residents.
BFP and rescue team arrived at Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Two children rescued from rising floodwater. Operations ongoing.
Diarrhea cases dumami sa Barangay Balulang CDO evacuation center. DOH nagpadala ng karagdagang health personnel.
Road clearing convoy proceeding to Brgy. Daraga Albay. Backhoes and dump trucks on route now.
Power restoration underway in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. 70 percent of households back online as of 6pm.
Cell towers coated with volcanic ash in Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Globe and Smart signal degraded. Engineers deploying.
LGU nagba-bawal ng pagbabalik ng mga evacuees sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban hanggang mababa ang alert level ng bulkan.
Relief convoy galing Marikina dumating na sa Barangay Agusan CDO. 200 boxes ng relief goods at hygiene kits.
Class suspension advisory: No classes in all levels in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley due to heat index reaching 45°C.
Ambulance requested para sa 3 critical patients sa Barangay Paco Manila evacuation center! Kailangan ng transport ngayon!
WALA PONG SIGNAL DITO SA BRGY. FATIMA GENERAL SANTOS! PLEASE PATAWID NG MENSAHE SA AMING PAMILYA!
Missing persons report: 5 residents of Brgy. Tumana Marikina unaccounted for since volcanic eruption 3 days ago.
Naputol ang tulay papunta sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Pag-aralan ang ibang daan bago umalis.
Overcrowding reported at Brgy. Pandacan Manila evacuation site. DSWD opening additional facility at municipal plaza.
Walang pasok! Super init ngayon sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Hindi ligtas ang mga bata. DepEd nag-suspend na.
DepEd nagbibigay ng make-up classes pagkatapos ng baha. School calendar extended ng 2 linggo sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental.
NDRRMC confirms 4 fatalities due to flash flood in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Families of victims have been notified.
Philippine Coast Guard rescuing fishermen stranded at sea near Brgy. Pandacan Manila after typhoon signal upgrade.
URGENT: Wala na pong food pack dito sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga! Need pa ng bigas at canned goods para sa 100 families!
Missing person: family tracing for 3 persons from Barangay Anibong Tacloban who have not contacted family since typhoon.
Heat stroke emergency: 5 outdoor workers collapsed in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga needing immediate medical rescue.
Child-friendly space opened at Brgy. Carmen CDO evacuation center for minors. Activities and psychosocial support ongoing.
Walang kuryente at signal sa Sitio Riverside Marikina nang 3 araw na. Sana mabilis maibalik ng Meralco at Globe.
Families from Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga danger zones transported via LGU buses to inland evacuation shelters.
No internet available sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas upland barangays. PLDT deploying additional equipment.
Patay na ang isang lalaki na nahanap sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro riverbank. Dinala na sa morgue ng probinsya.
School closure in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan: buildings covered with ashfall. Cleaning and decontamination needed before reopening.
PHIVOLCS update: Mayon crater glow intensifying. Possibility of explosive eruption cannot be ruled out. Alert Level 3 maintained.
Ang DSWD ay naghahanda ng food packs para sa mga pamilyang lumikas dahil sa bulkang aktibidad sa Barangay Paco Manila.
Logistics team coordinating boat transport for communities cut off by flooding in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan.
Hotline ng Manila City DRRM Department para sa emergency: (02) 8463-3295 / 0950-700-3710. Tumawag kung may health emergency dahil sa polusyon.
ALERTO: Ang usok mula sa sunog sa landfill ay nakakaapekto sa kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila at karatig-siyudad. Magsuot ng N95 mask.
Typhoon road damage report for Brgy. Poblacion Iligan: 5 roads closed, 8 bridges assessed for structural damage.
Ang tulay sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban ay nasira ng baha at lahar. Kailangan ng ilang linggo bago maayos.
Mga evacuees sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental covered court ay binibigyan ng sleeping area, kumot, at pagkain. Maayos naman.
USAR team deployed to collapsed building in Barangay Agusan CDO. 3 persons confirmed trapped inside structure.
Evacuation ongoing: residents from ashfall-heavy areas of Brgy. Tumana Marikina being moved to secondary evacuation centers.
Overcrowding na sa Sitio Masag Albay evacuation site. Secondary shelter sa barangay chapel ay bukas na ngayon.
Ang bilang ng patay mula sa baha sa Barangay Paco Manila ay tumaas na sa 9. Naghahanap pa ng 6 na nawawala.
Ashfall rendering roads in Brgy. San Roque Marikina slippery and dangerous. DPWH deploying water trucks for road washing.
SOS! TRAPPED SA BUBONG! Floodwater waist-deep at rising fast! Need rescue boat AGAD sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental!
Walang kuryente sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas dahil sa abo ng bulkan. Meralco nag-iinspeksyon ng mga linya.
Facemask reminder: Ang air quality sa Lungsod ng Maynila ay VERY UNHEALTHY na. Protektahan ang inyong kalusugan. Iwasan ang outdoor activities.
Ang alternate route via sitio Barangay Anibong Tacloban ay passable na para sa medium trucks. 4WD recommended.
Helicopter rescue ongoing for communities in Barangay Paco Manila cut off by landslide. 50 persons airlifted.
Rescue operation sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte: dalawang bata ang naligtas sa baha. Nagpapatuloy pa ang paghahanap.
Ang air quality sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina ay nasa hazardous level. Huwag lumabas nang walang mask. DOH nag-aalerto.
Barangay Brgy. Tumana Marikina begins door-to-door evacuation along sitio riverside. Officials and BFP assisting families.
Food packs with high-energy biscuits and canned goods being distributed in Barangay Anibong Tacloban volcanic evacuation area.
EMERGENCY: Isang bata ang nalunod sa baha sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Dinala na sa ospital. Mangyaring mag-ingat sa paligid.
No power in Barangay Agusan CDO for 48 hours. Generator sets operating at hospitals and evacuation centers.
Natuklasan ang katawan ng isa sa mga nawawalang residente sa Barangay Balulang CDO. Ipinagdadasal namin siya.
School cancellation alert: Lahat ng paaralan sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro ay sarado bukas dahil sa bagyo.
Ang mga residente mula sa 4km danger zone ng Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga volcano ay tumatanggap na ng relief goods.
Hindi pa pwedeng umuwi ang mga taga-Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Aktibo pa ang bulkan. Manatili sa evacuation center.
NDRRMC confirms 0 typhoon fatalities in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan due to preemptive evacuation. Officials commend LGU action.
75 families allowed to return home after flood receded in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. 300 families still remaining in shelter.
Mountain rescue: SARDA team deployed for 8 missing hikers in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan after trail buried by landslide.
NDRRMC activates full response for Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City eruption. Pre-positioned relief goods and rescue teams on standby.
Food assistance ongoing for displaced families in Brgy. Tumana Marikina following volcanic activity. Bring barangay ID.
DepEd releases distance learning materials for Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City students affected by volcanic eruption school closure.
PHIVOLCS volcano bulletin: Mayon showing continued effusive activity for the 110th consecutive day. Danger zone remains enforced.
Signal No. 2 pa rin sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. LGU nagtatayo ng karagdagang evacuation center para sa mga hindi pa lumikas.
Ang aming pamilya ay naka-shelter na sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga covered court. May relief goods at tubig. Salamat DSWD.
Provisional bridge at Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley constructed by Army engineers. Single lane, 3-ton weight limit.
Eye wash stations set up at Brgy. Daraga Albay health center for residents affected by ashfall irritation.
Cool centers open at Brgy. Tumana Marikina covered court and gymnasium. Free air conditioning for senior citizens and children.
SOS! Out of stock na ang relief goods sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. 300 families pa ang walang makain ngayong gabi!
Typhoon-induced flooding in Barangay Agusan CDO forces 500 additional families into evacuation. Centers now at capacity.
NDRRMC rescue teams extract 50 families from flood-affected sitio in Sitio Masag Albay.
Puno na ang evacuation center sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Pumunta sa bagong shelter sa sports complex ng bayan.
Death toll from flash flood confirmed at 50 in Brgy. Daraga Albay. Families may claim remains at the morgue.
Confirmed dead in the landslide at Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga: 2 adults, 1 child. Search for more survivors ongoing.
Meralco linemen nagtatrabaho sa tag-araw na init para maibalik ang kuryente sa Barangay Paco Manila. Salamat!
Hindi pa pwedeng umuwi ang mga evacuees sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Naghihintay pa ng clearance mula sa barangay.
Air quality advisory: VERY UNHEALTHY level detected in Manila and nearby cities. Ang mga bata, senior citizens, buntis, at may hika ay dapat manatili sa loob.
PHIVOLCS confirms lava fountaining at Barangay Paco Manila crater. Lahars possible in river channels. Evacuate river zones.
Volunteers needed para sa repacking ng relief items sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Report sa DSWD office by 7am bukas.
NDRRMC reports 3 fatalities from lahar flow in Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Families notified. Bodies at provincial morgue.
Lahar flow blocking the main highway near Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. DPWH monitoring. Alternate route via mountain road.
Ang pamilya ng mga biktima ng lahar sa Brgy. Carmen CDO ay maaaring pumunta sa MDM desk para sa tulong.
RESCUE: Elderly resident found unconscious due to heat stroke at Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Ambulance dispatched.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Rescue boat deployed to Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Prioritizing elderly, children, and PWDs stranded in floodwater.
Blackout pa rin sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Running low na sa power bank. Sana maibalik na ang kuryente.
Ashfall-induced brownout in Sitio Riverside Marikina: short circuit from ash accumulation on transformer. Clearing ongoing.
Kanlaon Watch: Alert Level 2 raised. Residents within 4-km radius must pre-emptively evacuate. NDRRMC on full alert.
Communication restored in Brgy. San Roque Marikina using emergency satellite link. Contact numbers for LGU updated.
Typhoon blew out main transformer serving Brgy. Carmen CDO. Replacement unit being transported from Pampanga.
100 families evacuated from Sitio Mabolo Albay volcanic danger zone. Temporary shelter at General Santos Sports Complex.
Naligtas na ang mga bata sa baha sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. Salamat sa BFP at sa lahat ng nagtulungan.
Hindi pa rin maibalik ang signal sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Ang komunikasyon ay sa radyo na lang.
Ang mga cell tower ay nasira ng bagyo sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Kailangan ng bagong equipment para maitayo.
Road visibility near zero in Brgy. Tumana Marikina due to heavy ashfall. Motorists advised to pull over and wait.
Mga guro sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina naglilingkod bilang volunteers sa evacuation center habang walang klase.
Heat advisory class suspension for Brgy. Talisay Batangas: Grades 1 to 12 and college all suspended for today.
Internet access via satellite terminal available at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro municipal hall for disaster coordination.
SOS mula sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro: isang lolo at dalawang bata ay naiipit sa lahar! Kailangan ng rescue agad!
Nag-distribute na ng relief goods sa brgy hall ng Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Magdala ng ID para makakuha ng food pack.
Swift water rescue team training deployed to actual operations at Brgy. Talisay Batangas river during lahar event.
Logistics team coordinating chopper delivery to cut-off communities in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City after roads washed out.
Mga estudyante sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley ay nakatanggap ng printed modules habang sarado ang kanilang paaralan.
Nablock na lahat ng daan sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan dahil sa lahar. Mga relief trucks nagde-detour na sa kabila.
DOH nagbababala: Dehydration at heat stroke ang pangunahing panganib sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City ngayong araw. Uminom ng maraming tubig.
Ang aking kaibigan ay nawawala mula nang bumaha sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Nahanap na ba siya ng sinuman?
Health advisory: Ang mga bata, matatanda, buntis, at may hika ay huwag lumabas habang mababa ang air quality sa Maynila.
Ang lahar ay dumating na sa bayan ng Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Huwag na lumabas. Sarado lahat ng daan.
ADVISORY: Fine particulate matter (PM2.5) sa mapanganib na antas sa buong Maynila. Magsuot ng facemask lalo na ang mahihina ang kalusugan.
Road update sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental: passable na sa isang lane. Slow traffic pa rin. DPWH nag-aayos pa.
DOH-Tacloban nagpapadala ng health team para subaybayan ang mga heat stroke at dehydration cases sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan.
Emergency water distribution for drought-hit families in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. 20L per household, bring container.
Mag-ingat sa leptospirosis! Huwag lumakad sa baha nang walang proteksyon sa Barangay Balulang CDO at karatig-lugar.
Typhoon update: Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley covered court evacuation center now accommodating 500 displaced families.
Calling all donors! Accepting relief goods donations for Barangay Marikina Heights flood victims. Drop off at the covered court.
Leptospirosis risk remains HIGH in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan post-flood areas. Still avoid wading even after waters recede.
Naiipit pa rin ang 50 pamilya sa Sitio Riverside Marikina. Hindi pa nakakarating ang rescue boat. Tulong po!
Air quality VERY UNHEALTHY sa Puregold Tayuman area at karatig-lugar. Mahigpit na inirerekomenda na huwag lumabas nang walang facemask.
Bridge inspection underway at Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Currently closed pending structural assessment by DPWH engineers.
WASH advisory: Boil all drinking water in Brgy. Talisay Batangas following ashfall contamination of water sources.
Volcanic ash from Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro volcano detected. Air quality hazardous. Wear masks and close windows.
SOS mula sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro: nastranded na hikers, 5 tao, 2 sugatan. Mountain trail blocked ng landslide.
HEAT INDEX ADVISORY: Apparent temperature in Brgy. Daraga Albay reaches 45°C. DANGER level. Avoid outdoor activities 10am-4pm.
Ang mga generator ng ospital sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental ay gumagana nang maayos kahit walang kuryente sa buong lungsod.
Road to Sitio Masag Albay volcano observation post closed due to volcanic hazard. Only PHIVOLCS personnel allowed.
DSWD mobile relief team deployed to Barangay Paco Manila communities affected by ashfall from volcanic eruption.
Kanlaon Volcano Alert Level 3: LGU buses ferrying evacuees from danger zone to designated evacuation centers in lowland areas.
Power interruption sa Barangay Marikina Heights: Meralco nagtatayo ng temporary lines para sa evacuation centers muna.
Lumikas na agad ang mga nakatira sa coastal areas ng Barangay Marikina Heights dahil sa Signal No. 4 na idineklara.
Missing fishermen from Barangay Anibong Tacloban declared dead after 30-day search. Bodies never recovered. Certificates issued.
Remains of 2 victims of Brgy. San Roque Marikina volcanic lahar identified at provincial morgue. Burial rites ongoing.
Medical tents with cooling stations deployed at Brgy. Tumana Marikina evacuation center for heat-stressed evacuees.
Smart at Globe nagsasagawa ng emergency network restoration sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro matapos ang bagyo.
Relief operations underway in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. DSWD deploying non-food items including hygiene kits, sleeping mats, and tarpaulins.
First aid supplies running low at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation center. Need gauze, antiseptic, and fever medicine urgently.
DepEd Barangay Anibong Tacloban says schools will reopen once ashfall is cleaned and ventilation systems are cleared.
Heat exhaustion cases reported at Brgy. Fatima General Santos outdoor market. DOH team dispatched. Symptoms: dizziness, weakness.
Solar charging stations set up by DSWD in Barangay Balulang CDO evacuation center for displaced residents.
DSWD relief convoy arrived at Brgy. Tumana Marikina with 300 boxes of food packs and non-food items for flood survivors.
Ang mga naapektuhang pamilya sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina ay bibigyan ng emergency food assistance ngayong linggo.
Rescue needed: 5 persons stranded on rooftop in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Water chest-deep and still rising.
Road network update for Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan: 3 routes open, 2 blocked by landslide, 1 passable for light vehicles only.
MnlCDRRMD advisory: Air quality sensors sa Maynila ay nagpapakita ng VERY UNHEALTHY. Mga may respiratory illness ay ipinagbabawal lumabas.
Fallen tree blocking the access road to Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Clearing crew on site. Passable in 2 hours.
Ang tubig ay nalason na ng baha sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Huwag uminom ng walang pakuluan muna ng limang minuto.
DepEd Brgy. Carmen CDO advisory: No classes for elementary, high school, and college levels until further notice.
PLDT fiber cut in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga due to ashfall weight on cables. Internet service disrupted for area.
REMINDER: Ang paggamit ng facemask ay mandatory sa labas habang masamang kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila. N95 o surgical mask ang inirerekomenda.
MISSING: Lola Nena, 78, nawawala mula nang lumikas sa volcanic eruption sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Pink duster.
Relief goods convoy arrives at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City from provincial government. 500 families to receive assistance today.
Charging stations set up at Brgy. Talisay Batangas evacuation center. Bring your power bank and mobile devices.
Displaced families from Brgy. Fatima General Santos to be temporarily relocated to safer housing pending flood damage assessment.
PAGASA issues heat index warning for Brgy. Carmen CDO and surrounding areas. Feels like 47°C. Stay indoors if possible.
All stranded residents in Brgy. Daraga Albay volcanic zone have been safely evacuated. Rescue operations complete.
Heat stroke emergency: 3 patients from Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga admitted to hospital. Walang pasok para sa mga outdoor workers.
May nastranded na hikers sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga bundok dahil sa landslide. Search party naalis na.
Body found in lahar deposit near Barangay Agusan CDO river. Identity being confirmed. Family may approach MDM desk.
Red Cross distributing 100 family food packs in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro today. Donations of canned goods and rice still accepted.
Parents, please do not send children to school tomorrow in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Roads are flooded and dangerous.
MISSING child: Anak ko nawawala! 8 years old, nahulog sa baha malapit sa Sitio Masag Albay. Tulong po!
Libre ang canned goods at bigas para sa mga nasalanta sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Pumunta na sa distribution point.
Ang sunog sa Navotas Landfill ay nagdudulot ng masamang kalidad ng hangin sa buong Maynila. Sarado ang ilang outdoor venues bilang pag-iingat.
Missing person alert: Maria Dela Cruz, 45, last seen fleeing lahar in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. Wearing red blouse.
SARADO ang tulay sa Sitio Masag Albay dahil sa baha! Gumamit ng alternatibong daan papunta sa Marikina.
DSWD providing water and food to heat-affected communities in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Hydration packs included.
School principals in Brgy. Pandacan Manila coordinating with barangay to ensure no students commuting in dangerous ashfall.
Meron pang food packs sa Brgy. Daraga Albay hanggang ngayong hapon. Magdala ng ID at pumunta na agad.
Water refill stations now at 5 strategic points in Sitio Riverside Marikina. Free for all residents during heat emergency.
Pediatric advisory: Huwag palabasin ang mga bata sa labas ng bahay sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental dahil sa matinding init.
BFP responds to fire at Barangay Marikina Heights barangay. 2 families rescued from burning structure. Fire under control.
Family tracing for Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga volcanic eruption: 15 persons still unaccounted for. Report to DSWD MDM desk.
Chokepoint sa national highway ng Sitio Mabolo Albay dahil sa demolition ng damaged bridge. Abangan ang updates.
LGU Cavite distributes 300 food packs and 50 hygiene kits to flood-affected families today.
Emergency satellite communication deployed in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga for disaster coordination after cell tower damage.
1 dead, 3 missing after landslide in Barangay Marikina Heights. NDRRMC rescue team recovers body from debris.
Death certificates being processed at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro municipal hall. Bring burial clearance documents.
NFI distribution: hygiene kits and sleeping mats for 150 displaced families from Sitio Riverside Marikina volcanic zone.
Water purification tablets distributed to 200 households in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Do not drink untreated floodwater.
DOH issues dengue alert alongside heat advisory in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Remove stagnant water. Use mosquito repellent.
DOH mobile clinic stationed at Sitio Masag Albay. Treating fever, wound care, diarrhea, and leptospirosis cases.
Evacuation order lifted for parts of Sitio Mabolo Albay. Residents may return home after clearance from DRRMO.
Heat advisory from PAGASA: Barangay Balulang CDO and nearby municipalities to experience 'feels like' temperature of 48°C tomorrow.
May leptospirosis na sa aming lugar sa Sitio Masag Albay. Iwasan ang pagtapak sa maruming tubig-baha. Mag-ingat!
Sanitation teams disinfecting evacuation centers in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley to prevent cholera and disease outbreak.
Power demand too high sa Sitio Mabolo Albay dahil lahat gumagamit ng aircon. Posibleng brownout ngayong hapon.
DOH issues leptospirosis alert for flood-affected barangays in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Avoid wading in floodwater. Wear protective boots.
5 fishermen missing after boat capsized near Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley coast. PCG search and rescue ongoing.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Philippine Air Force helicopter rescuing communities isolated by lahar flows in Brgy. Tumana Marikina volcano slopes.
Clean water supply restored to Barangays 4 to 7 in Barangay Paco Manila. Boil for 5 minutes before drinking as precaution.
Isinasagawa ang headcount ng lahat ng evacuees sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City evacuation center. Pumirma sa logbook.
Typhoon aftermath: fallen trees block 12 roads in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City municipality. Clearing operations underway.
Meralco please ayusin na ang power sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga! 72 oras na walang kuryente. Grabe na ito!
NDRRMC casualty update: 100 dead, 12 missing from typhoon in Sitio Riverside Marikina. Recovery operations ongoing.
Family tracing desk bukas sa Barangay Agusan CDO evacuation center. I-report ang mga nawawalang pamilya ngayon.
Class suspension confirmed! Walang klase bukas sa lahat ng levels sa Brgy. Daraga Albay. Abangan ang advisory.
Mga kababayan, ang evacuation center sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental brgy hall ay puno na. Pumunta sa secondary site sa sports complex.
Warning: Do not return to Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley without clearance from DRRMO. Flood waters still being assessed.
Convoy ng 10 trucks dumating na sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley pagkatapos ng 12-oras na byahe via alternate mountain road.
Class suspension due to volcanic ashfall in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City: schools need 3 days to clean before reopening.
WASH cluster deployed to Sitio Riverside Marikina. Setting up handwashing stations, portable toilets, and clean water supply.
Donation drive for Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental evacuees: accepting canned goods, rice, bottled water, and hygiene items.
Academic calendar suspended for affected schools in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. DepEd to announce make-up class schedule.
Relief goods delivery to Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley delayed due to 3 blocked roads. Air delivery being explored by NDRRMC.
Volunteer rescue swimmers needed at Brgy. Talisay Batangas riverbank. Call DRRMO hotline now for coordination.
Ang mga pamilyang lumikas mula sa Barangay Marikina Heights ay tumatanggap ng dalawang food pack at bottled water bawat isa.
Ang kalsada papunta sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley ay natatakpan ng makapal na abo. DPWH nag-aayos. Huwag muna pumunta.
Bridge at Brgy. Fatima General Santos flooded with lahar debris. Engineers inspecting structural integrity before reopening.
Supply delivery to isolated barangays in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City by boat due to all land routes blocked by typhoon debris.
Ang kuryente sa Sitio Riverside Marikina ay naibalik na. Salamat sa Meralco at sa lahat ng nagtrabaho.
Hikers rescued from Brgy. Poblacion Iligan mountain trail after being stranded by volcanic activity. All safe.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: DOST-EMB air quality index sa Sitio Riverside Marikina ay 201-300 VERY UNHEALTHY. Mag-stay sa loob ng bahay.
Respiratory health alert: Fine particulate matter levels in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley exceeding safe limits due to volcanic emissions.
Road subsidence detected on provincial road of Brgy. Daraga Albay. Heavy vehicles must detour via bypass.
Nutrition assistance para sa malnourished children sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas health center. Magdala ng health card.
Ang mga may asthma at respiratory conditions ay dapat manatili sa loob ng bahay sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental dahil sa abo.
Ayuda para sa mga walang hanapbuhay dahil sa volcanic unrest sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas. I-register sa DSWD ngayon.
No face-to-face classes in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City due to Typhoon Signal No. 2. Online and modular learning activated.
Ang mga displaced families sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley ay puwedeng manatili sa evacuation center hanggang ligtas na.
PHIVOLCS raises Alert Level 3 over Mayon Volcano. Entry into the 6-km Permanent Danger Zone (PDZ) is strictly prohibited.
DPWH nag-aayos na ng daan sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Tatlong araw pa bago ganap na maabot ang sitio.
LGU nagbubukas ng 5 dagdag na evacuation centers sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos para sa mga lumikas mula sa bulkan.
Air quality sensor sa Sampaloc at Tondo ay nagpapakita ng VERY UNHEALTHY. Iwasan ang lugar na may mataas na polusyon ngayon.
Relief convoy to Brgy. Talisay Batangas delayed by ashfall-covered roads. DPWH is clearing. ETA revised to 6pm.
Heat-related rescue in Sitio Mabolo Albay: elderly woman in distress found on street during extreme heat advisory.
NFI distribution ongoing. Hygiene kits, blankets, and sleeping mats available at Brgy. Fatima General Santos barangay hall.
Post-mortem examination ordered for body found in Barangay Balulang CDO. Identity still being confirmed by authorities.
PHIVOLCS raises Alert Level 3 for Brgy. Fatima General Santos volcano. Residents within 6km danger zone must evacuate NOW.
Power lines down on the main road in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Do not approach downed wires. Report to Meralco.
Debris flow from Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga volcano closes 3 major roads. Relief goods delivery using air transport.
Oral rehydration salts at energy drinks ibinibigay ng health center sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental para sa heat-related cases.
Fire out at Barangay Marikina Heights! BFP controlled the fire. No casualties reported. BFP reminds public to report fires immediately.
PCG conducting search for missing boat with 50 passengers near Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley during typhoon.
Classes resume next Monday for Brgy. Poblacion Iligan schools. Buildings assessed as safe. See you mga estudyante!
Online class na lang bukas para sa lahat ng students sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Tingnan ang Google Classroom.
DOH at Manila DRRM nagbababala tungkol sa masamang kalidad ng hangin. Mga sintomas ng polusyon: ubo, pangangati ng mata, kahirapan sa paghinga.
USAR team deployed to Barangay Marikina Heights after lahar buried 3 houses. Rescue dogs and thermal cameras in use.
OFFICIAL: DepEd suspends classes in all grade levels in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan effective tomorrow. Monitor official advisory.
Displacement update: 50 families na ang naka-shelter sa covered court ng Sitio Riverside Marikina. Overflow na ang dami.
Nandito na kami sa evacuation center sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Ikatlong gabi na namin dito. Sana makauwi na kami.
Ash deposits 10cm thick on Brgy. Carmen CDO highway. DPWH recommends complete avoidance until cleared.
DOH nagpaalala sa mga evacuees sa Brgy. Daraga Albay na inumin ang maintenance medicine. Available ang refills sa clinic.
MAYDAY! Naiipit kami sa loob ng bahay sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro! Tubig hanggang bintana na! Tulong po!
Mga donation ng tubig at pagkain para sa mga evacuees mula Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley volcano ay tinatanggap sa barangay hall.
Extreme heat alert for Barangay Marikina Heights. Heat index forecast at 43°C to 46°C. At-risk: elderly, children, outdoor workers.
College students in Barangay Paco Manila advised to stay home during heat advisory. Exams moved to next week.
Sunstroke warning for outdoor workers in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Wear hat, drink water every 15 minutes. Avoid direct sunlight.
DPWH road clearing underway in Barangay Balulang CDO after ashfall. Roads expected to be fully passable by tomorrow morning.
Hydration stations set up along evacuation routes from Brgy. Talisay Batangas due to high heat index. Water and ORS available.
Typhoon casualty: body of missing resident from Brgy. Poblacion Iligan found 5km from home. Family contacted.
Road update: Brgy. Carmen CDO national road now passable for light vehicles after DPWH ashfall clearing operations.
Manila City DRRM nagbibigay ng libreng facemasks sa mga barangay hall. Pumunta na ngayon para protektahan ang inyong pamilya mula sa polusyon.
Ante-mortem data collection ongoing for Sitio Kapatagan Leyte flood victims. Bring recent photos and descriptions.
Tulong po para sa mga pamilyang walang makain sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Makikipag-ugnayan sa DSWD para sa relief goods.
DepEd advisory sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga: lahat ng paaralan ay sarado bukas dahil sa Typhoon Signal No. 3.
BFP please tumugon sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro! May sunog at hindi kami makalabas! Naiipit sa loob!
Mayon Volcano Alert Level 3 remains in effect. Incandescent lava flows and PDC activity recorded. Evacuation order stands.
Volcanic eruption imminent at Sitio Mabolo Albay. PHIVOLCS orders total evacuation of all communities near the volcano.
Death toll rises to 8 as recovery operations continue in Barangay Agusan CDO. Search for 5 missing persons ongoing.
EMERGENCY: Kulang ang hygiene kits sa Barangay Paco Manila evacuation distribution. Requesting immediate resupply from DSWD!
Schools in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City to remain closed for 1 week due to ashfall damage and air quality concerns.
Ang mga nakatira sa loob ng 6km permanent danger zone ng Barangay Agusan CDO bulkan ay KAILANGANG LUMIKAS NA.
Field hospital set up near Brgy. Pandacan Manila to handle surge of injured and sick patients from flood-affected areas.
DepEd releases learning continuity plan for flood-affected areas in Sitio Mabolo Albay. Printed modules distributed.
Rescue operations in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga: BFP, PNP, and Army coordinating extraction of 40 stranded residents.
Family welfare desks naka-set up sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation site. I-report dito ang mga nawawalang miyembro ng pamilya.
Ang health center sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina ay bukas hanggang 8pm. Libre ang pagtingin sa mga may sakit na apektado.
Food donation drive ongoing for Brgy. Carmen CDO. Target: 500 food packs for displaced families. Help us reach the goal.
Fire update: BFP contained the blaze at Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley warehouse after 2 hours. Investigation ongoing.
Family tracing desk at Barangay Marikina Heights evacuation center: 47 persons reunited with families so far this week.
TXTFIRE! Sunog sa Barangay Marikina Heights! Tumawag sa BFP ngayon! Lumayas na sa lugar!
Water containers and purification tablets distributed to 500 households in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Instructions included.
NTC advisory: Emergency radio frequencies active. Tune to DZRH or local FM for disaster updates.
Ipinagpapaliban ang lahat ng school activities sa Brgy. Carmen CDO hanggang sa karagdagang paunawa ng DepEd.
Road advisory: thick ashfall deposit on Sitio Masag Albay national highway. Reduce speed. Use headlights. Wear mask.
Naglumikas na po kami dahil sa bulkan sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Nandito na kami sa covered court. Ligtas naman.
Rescue boat needed URGENTLY at Sitio Mabolo Albay! Elderly couple stranded on roof. Please respond now!
3 school buildings damaged by flooding in Brgy. Talisay Batangas. DepEd repair timeline: 2 to 3 weeks.
Remains of 2 typhoon victims recovered at Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Pending identification at provincial morgue.
Class suspension order issued for Barangay Balulang CDO due to Typhoon Signal No. 3. All schools closed today.
Volcanic eruption damaged power infrastructure near Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Blackout expected for 2 to 3 days.
Mababa ang kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila simula ngayong gabi. Mga may asthma at respiratory conditions: huwag lumabas. Gamitin ang inhaler.
Lahar alert in Mayon river channels during rain. Residents in river valleys must evacuate regardless of alert level.
Road passability update: 6 of 9 routes to Brgy. Pandacan Manila now open. 3 still blocked by debris and ashfall.
Supply truck natigil sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental junction. Baha masyadong malalim. Naghihintay na bumaba ang tubig.
Cell on wheels temporary tower deployed in Barangay Balulang CDO. Limited signal now available for affected residents.
Typhoon Signal No. 4 raised over Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Mandatory pre-emptive evacuation of coastal and low-lying areas.
Heat wave claims 2 lives in Sitio Riverside Marikina. Both elderly residents. DOH urges public to check on seniors.
Confirmed dead na ang 3 residente ng Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Nagsisimula na ng proseso para sa burial at interment.
Libreng pagkain at tubig para sa mga walang trabaho dahil sa tag-init sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Pumunta sa DSWD office.
Rescue swimmer needed at Brgy. Carmen CDO lahar crossing! Vehicle swept away! Occupants still inside!
Manila air quality update: Lahat ng 4 monitoring stations ay nagpapakita ng VERY UNHEALTHY. Manatiling alerto at sundan ang susunod na update.
Schools used as evacuation centers in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan during typhoon. Classes suspended until displaced families leave.
Health teams deployed to Barangay Marikina Heights to monitor for waterborne diseases including diarrhea and cholera.
Nakatanggap na kami ng food pack at tubig mula DSWD sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina. May kasamang canned goods at blanket.
Air quality update sa Maynila: VERY UNHEALTHY level. Possibleng dahilan ang usok mula sa Navotas Landfill. Manatiling alerto.
Power restored to 60% of Brgy. Pandacan Manila after typhoon damage repairs. Remaining areas by end of day.
DepEd Region IV-A announces no classes in public and private schools in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan tomorrow.
Post-mortem results for heat stroke victim from Sitio Masag Albay: cause of death heat hyperthermia. Third case this week.
MnlCDRRMD heat advisory: Heat index sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas ay nasa DANGER level na. Umiwas sa panlabas na gawain.
PHIVOLCS-DOST: Strombolian activity observed at Mayon summit crater. Pyroclastic density currents possible. Stay outside danger zone.
2 persons confirmed dead after lahar swept through Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City community. 4 still missing.
Generators distributed to Sitio Riverside Marikina evacuation centers by NDRRMC. Fuel supply for 72 hours.
Cell on Wheels (COW) unit deployed to Brgy. Tumana Marikina evacuation center. Signal now available for residents.
Medical mission at Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga evacuation center. Free consultation and medicines available 8am to 5pm today.
Nablock ang kalsada sa Barangay Balulang CDO. Landslide po. DPWH padating na. Iwasan muna ang lugar.
Post-disaster mortality review for Brgy. San Roque Marikina: 22 total deaths, 8 from drowning, 6 from trauma, 8 disease-related.
Ang rescue team ay nakarating na sa Sitio Mabolo Albay. Nagsisimula na ang pagliligtas sa mga naiipit sa lahar.
Official MDM count: 6 confirmed dead, 11 unaccounted for in flood-affected areas of Brgy. Tumana Marikina.
Preemptive evacuation order issued for danger zones in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. LGU providing transport assistance.
Ang Manila DRRM ay nagmo-monitor ng air quality sa 4 na sensor locations. Kasalukuyang lahat ay nasa VERY UNHEALTHY hanggang HAZARDOUS na antas.
URGENT: Patient na may symptoms ng leptospirosis sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan covered court. Need first aid team agad!
Food packs containing 5kg rice, sardines, and canned goods available at Barangay Marikina Heights distribution center. One pack per family.
Parents advised not to send children to school in Barangay Paco Manila until air quality returns to safe levels.
Ang relief goods mula sa LGU ay ibinibigay na sa mga affected families sa Barangay Marikina Heights. Isa lang per pamilya.
Cool center at Sitio Riverside Marikina gymnasium open 6am to 10pm. Libreng tubig, electric fan, at first aid on standby.
Port operations suspended in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Supply barges on standby. Coast Guard monitoring conditions.
Identification of volcanic eruption victims in Brgy. Tumana Marikina ongoing. NDRRMC using ante-mortem data records.
DPWH nagtatrabaho nang walang tigil para linisin ang kalsada ng Brgy. Talisay Batangas mula sa lahar at abo ng bulkan.
Sarado ang pangunahing daan sa Sitio Riverside Marikina dahil sa landslide. DPWH nagtatrabaho na.
Body identified as missing resident from Barangay Agusan CDO. Next of kin contacted. Interment on Saturday.
Wala na pong signal sa buong Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Globe, Smart, TM lahat wala. Gumagamit na kami ng radio.
Ang MDM team ng NDRRMC ay aktibo sa Sitio Mabolo Albay. Mag-report ng mga nawawalang kamag-anak dito.
150 displaced families now sheltered at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City gymnasium. Additional centers being opened tonight.
All clear at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City: all trapped residents rescued safely. Rescue teams thank community for cooperation.
HELP! Our neighbor is trapped on the second floor in Brgy. Daraga Albay! Water still rising! 911 not answering!
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Ang mga relief goods ay naghihintay sa barangay hall ng Sitio Masag Albay. Pumunta na at magdala ng ID.
Hindi pa passable ang kalsada sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Naghihintay pa ang mga trucks ng relief goods.
Lahar monitoring in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte: flow detected at 2m height in river channel. Road closures preemptive.
Hangin mula sa burning landfill ay nagtutulak ng usok sa direksyon ng Maynila. AQI forecast: VERY UNHEALTHY hanggang gabi. Manatiling alerto.
PHIVOLCS advisory: Lava flows possible at Sitio Mabolo Albay within 24 hours. Do not return to danger zone.
Search and rescue operations launched in Barangay Agusan CDO after flash flood. 8 rescue boats deployed.
Air quality advisory: Barangay Paco Manila classified VERY UNHEALTHY due to volcanic ashfall. Wear N95 mask outdoors.
ALERT: Ashfall advisory for Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Keep children indoors. Ashfall causes respiratory irritation and eye problems.
ALERT: Maraming bata ang may lagnat sa Sitio Masag Albay evacuation center! Kailangan ng doktor at gamot dito ngayon!
WALANG PASOK: Ashfall from Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro volcano makes road travel dangerous for students. Await DepEd advisory.
Meralco restoring power in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Estimated restoration: 18 to 24 hours. Repair crews deployed.
Walang klase bukas! Masaya ang mga bata sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas pero nakakatakot ang baha sa labas.
Staging area for relief operations set up in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Supply trucks loading for remote barangays.
Road safety alert: Brgy. Daraga Albay national highway has 15cm ashfall layer. Motorcycles banned from this route.
Official death toll update for typhoon in Brgy. Carmen CDO: 18 confirmed dead, 7 missing, 250 injured.
DSWD activates missing persons tracking system for Barangay Anibong Tacloban. File reports at the welfare desk now.
Mga residente ng Maynila: Isara ang mga bintana at pinto. Ang outdoor air quality ay VERY UNHEALTHY dahil sa usok at particulate matter.
Naligtas na ang pamilya mula sa lahar sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Salamat sa Coast Guard at Army rescue teams.
Heat wave causing power demand surge in Barangay Balulang CDO. Meralco warns of possible brownout 1pm to 6pm.
DRRMO Tacloban coordinating with PHIVOLCS for updated danger zone maps for Brgy. Tumana Marikina volcano evacuation.
Community kitchen at Barangay Paco Manila is now serving hot meals. Queue management in effect. Priority for elderly and children.
Libreng handa sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos community kitchen. Priority sa mga bata at matatanda ngayong mainit ang panahon.
Puno na ang unang evacuation center sa Brgy. Daraga Albay. Pumunta na sa Sports Hub bilang secondary shelter.
DepEd issues class suspension for Brgy. Carmen CDO and surrounding towns due to volcanic ash affecting air quality.
No network sa amin sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte! May makaka-abot ba sa Leyte? May signal pa ba diyan?
Casualty update for Sitio Masag Albay: 300 dead confirmed, bodies recovered and brought to provincial morgue.
Panahon ng tag-araw: nagbibigay ang DSWD ng rehydration packs at snacks sa mga batang apektado sa Barangay Balulang CDO.
Ang mga evacuees sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental covered court ay bibigyan ng pagkain at mga gamit ngayong gabi.
DPWH heavy equipment clearing lahar deposits from the access road to Brgy. Pandacan Manila. 4 hours estimated clearance time.
BFP and NDRRMC rescue team extracting 150 families from lahar-inundated areas of Brgy. Fatima General Santos.
Mag-ingat sa kalsada papunta sa Sitio Mabolo Albay. Maraming potholes at floating debris pagkatapos ng baha.
Camp coordination team at Barangay Agusan CDO: headcount ongoing. 150 registered evacuees as of 6pm.
UV index EXTREME sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte ngayon. Magbihis ng makapal at magsuot ng sombrero kapag lumabas.
Medical team ng DOH nandito na sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Libre ang konsultasyon at gamot para sa lahat ng evacuees.
Community feeding program active in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte for families unable to cook due to power outage from eruption.
Globe signal bumalik na sa ilang parte ng Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Smart at PLDT wala pa. Working on restoration.
Blackout na nang 2 araw sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina. Generator na lang ang naiiwanan namin. Sana mabilis na.
Navy rescue personnel assisting in evacuation of stranded residents in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental floodwater.
Huwag uminom ng tubig mula sa gripo sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Contaminated na dahil sa baha. Bumili ng mineral water.
Death toll from heat stroke in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City province rises to 4. DOH urges extreme caution during heat wave.
TXTFIRE! May sunog sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan! Naiipit ang tatlong tao! Tumawag sa BFP ngayon! 911!
Ang paaralan sa Brgy. Carmen CDO ay ginagamit bilang evacuation center. Suspendido ang klase hanggang maalis ang evacuees.
Ang effusive eruption ng Mayon Volcano ay nagpapatuloy. Lava flows, PDC, at rockfalls aktibo. Manatiling malayo sa danger zone.
Rescue boat needed at Barangay Agusan CDO lahar danger zone! Nanay at tatlong bata stranded. Rescue team padating.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Management of the Dead and Missing team deployed to Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga by NDRRMC. Operations 24 hours.
MISSING: Tatay ko si Rolando, 67, wala pa rin simula nang erupsyon ng bulkan sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Tulong!
Structure fire reported at Sitio Riverside Marikina public market. BFP units responding. 2-alarm fire declared.
Ang mga bata sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina ay binibigyan ng bitamina at gamot. Dalhin ang inyong anak sa health tent.
DRRM update: Air quality sa Maynila ay bahagyang bumababa mula HAZARDOUS papunta VERY UNHEALTHY. Patuloy na mag-ingat at magsuot ng mask.
Pyroclastic density currents or 'uson' recorded at Mayon today. Extreme danger within 6-km PDZ. Do not return to danger zone.
FIRE! Sumalab ang bahay sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos. BFP patungo na. Lumayo na mga tao sa paligid!
NDRRMC advisory: Effusive eruption at Mayon Volcano persists. Lava flows and rockfalls ongoing. Danger zone strictly enforced.
Teachers at Brgy. Talisay Batangas school-turned-evacuation-center voluntarily assist displaced families after class suspension.
Alert Level 3 sa Mayon: Mahigpit na ipinagbabawal ang pagpasok sa 6-km PDZ. Ang mga sumusuway ay pananagutin.
River rescue at Barangay Paco Manila: swift water rescue team recovering family stranded on mid-river debris.
Hindi maaaring pumasok ang mga bata sa paaralan sa Sitio Riverside Marikina. Sarado pa ang mga daan.
Mayon Volcano lava flow reaches 3.2 km from summit. PHIVOLCS warns of possible pyroclastic surge. Danger zone strictly enforced.
Latrines and sanitation facilities installed at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation center. One unit per 20 persons as per WASH standard.
Lahar rescue complete in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. All 23 stranded families evacuated. No casualties reported.
Emergency broadcast activated at local FM station. Broadcasting disaster updates for Brgy. Poblacion Iligan 24 hours.
No classes na ngayon sa Barangay Marikina Heights hanggang sa karagdagang paunawa ng DepEd. Manatili sa bahay.
School buildings in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan being used as evacuation centers. All classes moved to online learning mode.
PLDT announces network outage in Brgy. Fatima General Santos due to damaged cell towers. Engineers on site.
DSWD andito na sa amin sa Sitio Riverside Marikina! Nagbibigay ng hygiene kit at relief goods. Salamat po!
WALANG PASOK bukas sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban at karatig-bayan dahil sa matinding init. Heat index DANGER level na.
Academic year adjustment for Brgy. San Roque Marikina schools disrupted by volcanic activity. DepEd extending school year.
School feeding program suspended during displacement in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Nutrition packs distributed to families.
Ang mga naiipit ay inililigtas na sa Barangay Paco Manila. Huwag matakot. Ang rescue team ay patungo na.
Evacuation center at Brgy. Tumana Marikina covered court now open. Capacity 100 families. Bring important documents.
No classes in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan tomorrow due to extreme heat index. DepEd prioritizes student health and safety.
School supplies at libro nasira ng baha sa Sitio Riverside Marikina. DepEd nagre-request ng donations para sa mga estudyante.
Heatwave relief: cold water, ORS, and snacks available at Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga community center. Libre para sa lahat.
Death toll from flash flood in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley confirmed at 6. NDRRMC concludes search after 7 days.
No signal and no power in Sitio Masag Albay volcano evacuation zone. Emergency radio only communication channel.
Heat-related death confirmed in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. DOH investigating heat stroke fatality. Public warned.
